title: angraecum batesii
intro: Angraecum batesii, also known as the Bates' orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. It is native to tropical Africa and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to provide relief from pain, reduce inflammation, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Angraecum batesii is typically dried and used in infusions or decoctions to leverage its medicinal benefits.
